gazette: Official Gazette dated April 6, 2024, and numbered 32512
title: Initiation of Safeguard Investigation on Imports of Ethyl Acetate
bodyHtml:
A safeguard investigation has been initiated to examine whether the increase in imports of the product defined as "Ethyl Acetate" classified under customs statistical position 2915.31.00.00.00 poses a serious injury or threat of serious injury to the domestic industry.

The questionnaires related to the investigation and a non-confidential summary of the application can be found on the Ministry's website (http://www.ticaret.gov.tr) under the "Imports" section on the page titled "Trade Policy Defense Instruments" and under the link "Safeguard Measures/Investigations". The relevant page for this investigation can be downloaded from there.

Interested parties are required to complete the questionnaire within thirty days from the date of publication of the Regulation and submit it to the General Directorate.

Click here for the Investigation Regulation.
